response.justification: Candidate is a solid full-stack senior engineer with ~14 years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows). However, this role is a Director-level individual contributor Principal Engineer position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms built at scale, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers and inspire cross-org technical direction. The resume shows no evidence of recognized AI/ML expertise, no shipped AI products at scale, no advanced AI degree, and no track record of operating at Principal/Director IC level. Current title is Senior/Staff, not Principal, and AI work appears recent and tooling-focused rather than strategic.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure including MCP and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong community presence with talks, workshops, and open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI products/platforms shipped at meaningful scale
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level — lacks strategic advisory and org-wide influence signals
No advanced degree in AI and no entrepreneurial-within-large-org or cloud-platform strategy experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC bar
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
